content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — user-facing "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" label in SettingsView.swift:12 describes a shipped feature as unfinished/unstable
Pierre: Apple's reviewers may read "Experimental" as a sign the feature isn't ready for public release, which can trigger 2.1/2.2 questions about app completeness even though this isn't classic beta language. Metadata and release notes are clean, but this in-app string is user-visible and implies instability. Consider rewording to something like "New: AI Sort" without "experimental/unstable" if the feature is meant to ship in this build.
